name: FARMERS & MERCHANTS BANCORP
summary: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp (FMCB) is a Delaware-registered bank holding company organized in 1999, operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary Farmers & Merchants Bank of Central California (founded 1916). The Bank provides commercial, real estate, agricultural, and consumer loans, equipment leases, deposit products, credit cards, lockbox services, electronic funds transfers, and investment products through 30 full-service branches across California's Central Valley and San Francisco Bay Area counties.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Term loans, lines of credit, letters of credit, and working capital financing for businesses.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Lending products secured by commercial real estate properties.

products.name: Agribusiness Loans
products.description: Agricultural financing products for agribusiness customers.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Automobile financing, lines of credit, home improvement and home equity lines of credit.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Loans
products.description: Financing products for individual residential real estate purchases.

products.name: Equipment Leases
products.description: Equipment leasing products offered to business customers.

products.name: Deposit Products
products.description: Checking, savings, money market, time certificates of deposit, IRAs, and online banking.

products.name: Credit Card Program
products.description: Credit card program available for merchants and consumers.

products.name: Lockbox and Collection Services
products.description: Specialized lockbox and other collection services for commercial accounts.

products.name: Electronic Funds Transfers
products.description: Domestic and international wire transfers and automated clearinghouse services.

products.name: Investment Products
products.description: Mutual funds and annuities offered through a third-party provider with investment advisors.

products.name: Online Banking
products.description: Online account access and account reconciliation for business and personal customers.

products.name: Investment Sweep
products.description: Investment sweep services for commercial account customers.

partnerships.description: Third party employs investment advisors to offer mutual funds and annuities to Bank customers.
